text:
Market today: Mixed/cautious tone. The big real driver for your book is the Broadcom-OpenAI custom chip news — that's a direct AI infrastructure catalyst. Meanwhile, a potential Fed rate hike signal (Warsh) is a headwind for high-multiple tech, and war spending adds macro uncertainty.

Your holdings: PLTR down 12.77% and flagged SELL — on margin, that hole gets expensive fast; no reason to let it slide further toward the $85 stop, consider acting now. AVGO down 12.45%, your largest position, flagged TRIM — the OpenAI chip news is a positive, but you're still deeply underwater on your biggest bet; trimming reduces margin risk meaningfully. SPAL down 14.48% — this is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily; losses accelerate and margin amplifies that further, it needs tight active management.

Watch: 1) Any Fed official commentary on Warsh and rate hike timing — that's the single biggest macro threat to your entire tech-heavy book. 2) AVGO price action on the OpenAI chip headline — it's your largest position and has a direct catalyst today.

Bottom line: Your margin exposure on two deeply red large positions (PLTR, AVGO) is the fire that needs putting out before anything else.
